title: Smoked Duck Satay
description: A Thai-inspired dish featuring smoky duck, marinated in a blend of spices and grilled to perfection. Served with a side of peanut sauce.
instructions: 1. In a blender or food processor, combine bliss sugar, fish sauce, grated ginger, coconut milk, peanuts, palm sugar, garlic, and lemongrass. Blend until smooth.
2. Place the smoky duck breast in a large ziplock bag. Pour the marinade over the duck and seal the bag.
3. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
4. Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
5. Remove the duck from the marinade and cook for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
6. Let the duck rest for 5 minutes before slicing into thin strips.
7. Serve the duck with a side of peanut sauce and garnish with toasted peanuts and fresh cilantro.
